identity.archetype: The Performance Pro mixed with Organic Earthy

usage_rules.headings: Use Manrope for all headings (h1-h3) and data metrics (big numbers).
usage_rules.body: Use Inter for all long-form text, tables, and inputs.
usage_rules.numbers: Use tabular-nums class for all data grids and timers to prevent jitter.

structure.header: Sticky top, backdrop-blur-md, clean with search and user profile.

containers.card: rounded-xl border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200

buttons.primary: h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 active:scale-95 transition-all shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80

inputs.default: h-10 rounded-lg border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 transition-all focus:border-primary/50

status_badges.safe: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200 dark:bg-emerald-900/30 dark:text-emerald-300 dark:border-emerald-800
status_badges.warning: bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border-amber-200 dark:bg-amber-900/30 dark:text-amber-300 dark:border-amber-800
status_badges.expired: bg-red-50 text-red-700 border-red-200 dark:bg-red-900/30 dark:text-red-300 dark:border-red-800

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is slate-600 or darker on white backgrounds. Use slate-400 for secondary text.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the provided color variables.
Update 'index.css' with the CSS variables for light/dark themes.
Use 'Layout.js' as a wrapper component for the Sidebar and Header.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' for the Dashboard home page.
Use the 'status_badges' styles for the product list status column.
Ensure the 'Reports' page uses the 'recharts' library with the theme colors (chart-1 to chart-5).
universal_guidelines: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
No centered text for long paragraphs.
Use skeleton loaders instead of spinners for initial load.
